global_style.style_base: Whimsical storybook illustration with strong natural textures, warm forest palette, recurring acorn/leyline/Ratatoskr motifs

whisperwake_first_message.style_modifiers: Soft morning dew, light green tones, attentive listening posture
whisperwake_first_message.journal_prompt_seed: What message arrives for you today?
whisperwake_first_message.forage_bias: gentle new beginnings, listening before acting
whisperwake_first_message.mood_board_hints: Soft dawn light through leaves, single acorn on moss
whisperwake_first_message.story_seed_seed: A young squirrel hears the very first whisper carried on the morning mist...
whisperwake_first_message.art_prompt_seed: A young squirrel awakening to the first whisper of the lunation, delicate forest light, in the SQT Grove Style

discerned_hoard.style_modifiers: Warm focused light, rich earth tones, deliberate and wise squirrel expressions, subtle golden highlights on chosen items
discerned_hoard.journal_prompt_seed: What truly deserves a place in your hoard today?
discerned_hoard.forage_bias: selective attention, letting go of the non-essential, quality over quantity
discerned_hoard.mood_board_hints: A squirrel thoughtfully sorting a small pile of gleaming acorns on a sunlit root, soft shadows
discerned_hoard.story_seed_seed: Deep in the burrow, the squirrel opened the old cache and began to sort...
discerned_hoard.art_prompt_seed: A wise squirrel carefully curating a small pile of perfect acorns by lantern light inside a cozy burrow, rich textures, in the SQT Grove Style

leybridge_threading.style_modifiers: Chalk storybook illustration, highly detailed wood-grain textures, soft golden atmospheric dust
leybridge_threading.journal_prompt_seed: What small bridge are you threading today?
leybridge_threading.mood_board_hints: Steady path of pebbles across a stream, vines linking trees
leybridge_threading.story_seed_seed: One pebble at a time, the squirrel began laying a path across the rushing water...
leybridge_threading.art_prompt_seed: A determined squirrel carefully placing smooth pebbles to form a small bridge across a forest stream, glowing leylines in the water, highly detailed wood grain, soft golden dust, in the SQT Grove Style

burrowstill_knowing.style_modifiers: Warm dim light, protective curved forms, quiet introspection
burrowstill_knowing.journal_prompt_seed: What wisdom is settling in your burrow right now?
burrowstill_knowing.mood_board_hints: Dim lantern light inside a moss-lined burrow, a squirrel sitting still with closed eyes
burrowstill_knowing.story_seed_seed: The squirrel curled into the softest moss and let the day's fragments settle like fallen leaves...
burrowstill_knowing.art_prompt_seed: A peaceful squirrel resting in a dimly lit mossy burrow, soft curved walls, gentle light filtering through roots, contemplative expression, in the SQT Grove Style

chatterseed_scatter.style_modifiers: Lively breezy light, bright playful accents, seeds and ideas flying outward, joyful expressions
chatterseed_scatter.journal_prompt_seed: What idea, story, or resource are you ready to scatter today?
chatterseed_scatter.forage_bias: generosity without attachment, outward connection, joyful release
chatterseed_scatter.mood_board_hints: A cheerful squirrel tossing seeds into the wind from a high branch, golden afternoon light
chatterseed_scatter.story_seed_seed: At the edge of the canopy the squirrel laughed and flung a pawful of bright ideas into the breeze...
chatterseed_scatter.art_prompt_seed: A joyful squirrel on a high branch scattering shiny seeds and acorn caps into the wind, bright warm palette with emerald accents, dynamic motion, whimsical storybook illustration, in the SQT Grove Style

hoardkeepers_joyful_reckoning.style_modifiers: Bright celebratory light, playful yet wise squirrel expressions, abundant yet organized piles
hoardkeepers_joyful_reckoning.journal_prompt_seed: What are you joyfully keeping, releasing, or carrying forward from this cycle?
hoardkeepers_joyful_reckoning.forage_bias: celebration of progress, honest release, grateful selection
hoardkeepers_joyful_reckoning.mood_board_hints: Sun-drenched clearing with carefully arranged piles of acorns, squirrels dancing around them
hoardkeepers_joyful_reckoning.story_seed_seed: On the last day of the third lunation the great hoard was opened with laughter and song...
hoardkeepers_joyful_reckoning.art_prompt_seed: A jubilant gathering of squirrels in a sunlit forest clearing, piles of golden acorns being joyfully sorted and celebrated, bright warm palette with emerald and saffron accents, whimsical storybook, in the SQT Grove Style

shadow_trial.style_modifiers: Darker tones, dramatic contrast, resilient squirrel in mist, subtle silver and deep emerald
shadow_trial.journal_prompt_seed: When the usual path disappears, what clever new way forward can you find?
shadow_trial.forage_bias: facing resistance with creativity, low-visibility problem solving
shadow_trial.mood_board_hints: A single squirrel navigating a misty, root-tangled path with only faint moonlight
shadow_trial.story_seed_seed: The forest grew strangely quiet. The familiar trail had vanished into silver fog...
shadow_trial.art_prompt_seed: A clever resilient squirrel moving through deep misty woods on an obscured trail, dramatic high-contrast lighting, silver moonlight on fur, dark forest greens and slate tones, in the SQT Grove Style

the_burrow_rebirth.style_modifiers: Gentle renewal light, fresh greens breaking through old browns, hopeful and transformed expressions
the_burrow_rebirth.journal_prompt_seed: What old structure are you ready to let go of so something truer can grow?
the_burrow_rebirth.forage_bias: intentional rest followed by gentle rebirth and new growth
the_burrow_rebirth.mood_board_hints: Soft new light entering a refreshed burrow, tiny green shoots pushing through old moss
the_burrow_rebirth.story_seed_seed: After the long quiet, the squirrel pushed open the burrow door and blinked at the new green world...
the_burrow_rebirth.art_prompt_seed: A transformed squirrel emerging from a beautifully renewed burrow into soft golden-green dawn light, delicate new growth and fresh moss everywhere, hopeful atmosphere, in the SQT Grove Style

the_messengers_circuit_complete.style_modifiers: Full warm spectrum, strong circuit and leyline emphasis, radiant and integrated feeling, multiple squirrels or symbolic echoes
the_messengers_circuit_complete.journal_prompt_seed: Looking across the full year’s circuit, what wisdom are you bringing home?
the_messengers_circuit_complete.forage_bias: synthesis, sharing the full harvest, preparing the next cycle
the_messengers_circuit_complete.mood_board_hints: A radiant circular arrangement of all seasonal elements with Ratatoskr at the center
the_messengers_circuit_complete.story_seed_seed: Ratatoskr returned at last, carrying the whole year’s stories woven into one glowing thread...
the_messengers_circuit_complete.art_prompt_seed: Ratatoskr the messenger squirrel completing the great circuit, surrounded by a mandala of all the year’s acorns, leylines, and seasonal symbols in full warm forest palette with golden highlights, epic yet intimate whimsical storybook illustration, in the SQT Grove Style

shadowforage_eclipse.style_modifiers: Low-visibility atmosphere, muted greens and slate, soft diffused light, clever adaptive posture
shadowforage_eclipse.journal_prompt_seed: When the familiar path fades, what clever new route can you sense?
shadowforage_eclipse.forage_bias: navigate ambiguity with small careful steps; trust touch and memory over sight
shadowforage_eclipse.mood_board_hints: A squirrel moving through dim undergrowth, shapes half-hidden, one paw extended toward an unseen acorn
shadowforage_eclipse.story_seed_seed: The canopy dimmed as if a shadow passed over the moon. The squirrel slowed, whiskers wide, and foraged by feel alone...
shadowforage_eclipse.art_prompt_seed: A clever squirrel foraging in deep forest shadow on Forage-day, muted slate and emerald palette, diffused mist, half-visible acorns, whimsical storybook illustration, in the SQT Grove Style

whisper_storm.style_modifiers: Dynamic motion, overlapping light trails, energetic but not chaotic, cool violet accents on warm forest base
whisper_storm.journal_prompt_seed: Many whispers arrive at once — which message deserves your attention first?
whisper_storm.forage_bias: capture the best ideas quickly, then sort; do not chase every leaf in the wind
whisper_storm.mood_board_hints: Leaves and glowing message threads spiraling around a squirrel who pauses to listen amid the storm
whisper_storm.story_seed_seed: The whispers came all at once — a storm of acorn-tips, warnings, jokes, and prophecies. Ratatoskr laughed and spread both paws wide...
whisper_storm.art_prompt_seed: A squirrel amid a whirl of leaves and glowing whisper-trails in a forest gale, cool violet and soft cream accents, dynamic storybook motion, in the SQT Grove Style

hidden_cache_reveal.style_modifiers: Warm sudden revelation light, rich earth browns, golden highlight on rediscovered objects
hidden_cache_reveal.journal_prompt_seed: What forgotten idea or note is suddenly relevant again?
hidden_cache_reveal.forage_bias: revisit an old project, notebook, or commit; one buried insight may be ripe now
hidden_cache_reveal.mood_board_hints: A beam of light falling on a hidden cache of acorns and curled bark-scrolls inside an old burrow wall
hidden_cache_reveal.story_seed_seed: While shifting moss, the squirrel's claw struck hollow wood — and a cache no one remembered opened to the light...
hidden_cache_reveal.art_prompt_seed: A surprised squirrel discovering a hidden acorn cache revealed by a shaft of golden light in an old burrow, warm earth tones and dust motes, whimsical storybook detail, in the SQT Grove Style

ratatoskr_argument.style_modifiers: Tension in composition, warm amber vs cool slate accents, decisive posture, split lighting
ratatoskr_argument.journal_prompt_seed: Two whispers pull in different directions — what third path might weave them together?
ratatoskr_argument.forage_bias: name the trade-off explicitly; choose one path or design a synthesis before acting
ratatoskr_argument.mood_board_hints: A squirrel at a fork where two glowing leylines diverge, each carrying a different message scroll
ratatoskr_argument.story_seed_seed: Ratatoskr arrived with two whispers that could not both be true — or could they? The squirrel sat at the fork and listened harder...
ratatoskr_argument.art_prompt_seed: A thoughtful squirrel at a forest crossroads with two glowing leyline paths and opposing message scrolls, amber and slate contrast, dramatic storybook lighting, in the SQT Grove Style

leyline_surge.style_modifiers: Strong green-gold glow, network lines visible under bark and stream, amplified energy, connected feeling
leyline_surge.journal_prompt_seed: What connections are suddenly easier to make today?
leyline_surge.forage_bias: link two projects, people, or ideas that usually stay separate; ride the surge
leyline_surge.mood_board_hints: Glowing leylines blazing between trees, pebble bridges lit from beneath, everything briefly connected
leyline_surge.story_seed_seed: Every leyline in the Grove flared at once. The squirrel felt every burrow, bridge, and branch as one living circuit...
leyline_surge.art_prompt_seed: A forest scene with blazing green-gold leylines connecting roots, streams, and pebble bridges, a squirrel at the nexus, highly detailed wood grain, in the SQT Grove Style

burrow_rebuild.style_modifiers: Before-and-after energy, broken brown tones yielding to fresh green growth, constructive hope
burrow_rebuild.journal_prompt_seed: What old structure is ready to come down so something sturdier can grow?
burrow_rebuild.forage_bias: retire one brittle habit or tool; sketch the replacement before rebuilding
burrow_rebuild.mood_board_hints: An old burrow wall gently opened to fresh moss and new twig supports, morning light on rebuilt entrance
burrow_rebuild.story_seed_seed: The old wall finally gave way — not as disaster, but as permission. The squirrel began rebuilding with what the collapse had taught...
burrow_rebuild.art_prompt_seed: A squirrel rebuilding a burrow entrance with fresh twigs and moss after a gentle collapse, warm browns and new green shoots, hopeful storybook atmosphere, in the SQT Grove Style
